  1. Home
  2. Decals
  3. Create Custom Domed Decals | Decals | Decals.com

Custom Domed Decals

Create One-of-a-Kind Domed Decals!

★★★★★

Read All Reviews
  • Order Process
  • Materials
  • Artwork
  • Production Time
  • Shipping
  • Domed Decal Examples

Design Methods

Design from Scratch

With our easy to use online designer, you can quickly design your custom domed decals. Just upload an image or logo from your computer or choose from our wide selection of clipart to create your personalized domed decals.

Upload a File

If you decide to upload an original file, instead of designing your own, you will need to upload an .eps file. This ensures that you will receive the highest quality domed decals possible! Once you have added your product to your cart and select your shipping method, a proof will be emailed to you. When you approve your proof and make a payment, your order will be complete.

Payment

All orders must be paid up front prior to being put into production. We accept VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit cards. We also accept checks, which must be received prior to your domed decals being put into production. 

Live Order Tracking

Back in the early days of making decals, we built a system called Live Order Tracking that enables our customers to track their order through every stage of our streamlined process, from order placement to delivery.

After placing your order for domed decals, you’ll receive a unique Live Order Tracking number via email that will allow you to track your domed decals every step of the way. Need the current status of your order? Just click the link in the email and get the most recent updates from our dynamic Live Order Tracking system.

Domed Decal Materials

Our domed decals are screenprinted as a diecut decal with a crystal clear polyurethane top coat. This polyurethane 'dome' adds a 3-Dimensional look to the decal and enhances the imprinting while providing extra protection. Our Domed Decals are supplied in a 10" x 12.5" sheet format, not on a roll or individually cut.

Advantages of Domed Decals

Once enveloped in poured urethane coating, these decals gain superior qualities, becoming waterproof, weatherproof, rustproof, and resistant to scratches, fading, salt, acid, oil, and chemicals. Additionally, they exhibit a self-healing property against minor scratches and cuts. Our Domed Decals stand resilient even in challenging conditions, maintaining a pristine appearance over time, making them ideal for products exposed to both usage and the elements.

Domed Decal Artwork Requirements

Accepted File Formats:

  • .EPS
  • .AI
  • .PSD
  • .PDF (high res)
  • .JPG (high res)
  • .TIF

PLEASE NOTE -  .GIF or .PUB files will not be accepted

 

Additional Artwork Requirements:

  • All fonts must be converted to outlines
  • Set up size proportionate to the exact size product you are ordering 
  • Non-photographic art needs to be provided in vector format
  • All photographic images must have resolution of 300 dpi
  • We cannot use graphics that have been pulled from a Website
  • All linked graphics must be included
  • Specify PMS colors used in file when applicable
  • Only Allow for bleed if necessary
  • Never flatten/merge layers in a PSD file
  • Indicate the cut line clearly for all decal products

 

Disclaimers:


Vector Art
Vector art consists of lines and curves that are mathematically defined objects. When viewing art in key line mode you can see the points or vectors when connecting your lines and curves. They can also be seen when using the pen tool or editing the points along a path. Vector art is ideal for type and drawn shapes because they can be enlarged to any size while maintaining crisp outlines and details without sacrificing quality. The distance between the vectors is calculated mathematically and is not dependent upon resolution. 

 

Raster Art
Raster images consist of colored squares, called pixels. They are created by combining a series of various colored pixels. Digital photographs are made up of pixels. If you view a raster image at 200% or more you are able to see the individual pixels that make up the image. Raster images are dependent upon resolution so image enlargement is limited by the individual size at which the file was created. If a file is produced at a size that is larger than its resolution will allow, the quality will decrease. Printing a low resolution file will result in pixelation. Individual pixels are large enough to be easily discernable. Increasing the resolution will not solve this problem if there are not enough pixels to begin with. The program will add more pixels based upon the estimation of their location and will then assign their neighboring pixels's color value. This may cause an image to look muddy. 

If submitting these files, please follow the guidelines below:

100% scale (full size output) at 100 dpi
50% scale at 200 dpi or higher
25% scale at 300 dpi or higher
10% scale at 600-1200 dpi recommended


Design Services

If you are not able to provide us with a good quality image, we do have a vectorizing/recreating service available. Most logos or images can be recreated for as little as $15; however images with more detail are subject to quoting prior to vectorizing the image. Please contact a sales representative for more details.

This service needs to be paid for in advance of us printing your order. We will keep your recreated vector artwork on file for you to use on all future orders.

Releasing the recreated vector artwork to you for personal use can be done for an additional cost.

Domed Decal Production Time

Please note that our commitment to craftsmanship and precision requires a dedicated production process. Currently, our standard production time for domed decals is estimated at four weeks. This duration allows us to meticulously craft each decal to meet our stringent quality standards, ensuring that your brand receives a product that reflects excellence.

While we understand the importance of swift delivery, we believe that the unparalleled quality of our domed decals is worth the wait. Our skilled artisans work diligently to create a product that not only meets but exceeds your expectations. We appreciate your understanding and patience as we strive to provide you with a branding solution that stands out in both design and durability.

For any specific inquiries or to discuss your order further, our customer support team is readily available to assist you. Thank you for choosing Decals.com for your domed decal needs — where quality meets craftsmanship, and your brand shines.

Shipping

  • Decals.com ships within 2 - 4 business days (after production time) to 90% of the United States.
  • Unless otherwise specified, at the time of ordering, decals will ship via UPS Ground.
  • If you have any questions about shipping rates or rush production, please contact our friendly Customer Service Representatives at (320) 391-5250 prior to ordering.
  • You will receive a tracking number once your package has shipped.
  • To read more about our shipping information visit our shipping policy page.

Shipping Methods:

  • Economy (5-15 Days)
  • Standard (3-5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)

Important Economy Shipping Notes:

  • If choosing economy shipping, please include additional postal information such as your P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.
  • Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to. 

National and International Shipping Notes:

  • Decals.com ships throughout the United States and Internationally.
  • All international shipments must have shipping labels as well as customs documentation provided by the customers. We will only accept international shipping labels from the following carriers, USPS and UPS.
  • Contact a Customer Service Representative at (320) 391-5250 for more information.

Domed Decal Examples

** Please note, you domed decals are supplied in a 10" x 12.5" sheet format, not on a roll or individually cut.

                                             

Make a lasting impression with custom domed decals. Our premium decals are crafted to add an elegant, eye-catching 3D effect to your branding strategy. Perfect for businesses, these decals pop out in a competitive landscape, catching the eye and piquing the interest of potential customers.

The doming process covers your custom-printed decal with a clear, high-quality resin that gives a stunning glossy dome effect—adding depth and enhancing the colors beneath it.

      More About Custom Domed Decals Return to Top

      Using cutting-edge printing technology, we offer vibrant colors that stand out beneath the smooth, clear dome of our resin. This three-dimensional look not only attracts attention but also adds a touch of class to any surface it adorns.

      Whether you're promoting your business on company equipment or handing out high-end branded merchandise, our domed decals convey quality and professionalism.

      Elevate your promotional materials with custom domed decals today. Ideal for any business looking to make a statement, our decals offer an unrivaled blend of aesthetics and durability.

      Browse our domed decals and let your brand shine in a whole new dimension.

       

      Customer Reviews ... Reviews

      ★★★★★

      Don't take our word for it! See what others are saying.

        More Reviews

      Why Choose Decals.com?

      Customer Service

      Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

      Made in the USA

      All of our products are proudly made and manufactured here in the USA!

       

      Fast Turnaround

      Standard turnaround time ships your product within three business days.

      Track Your Order

      Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary live order tracking system.

      Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top

      Product Information

      What are domed decals?

      Domed decals, also known as domed labels or 3D decals, are a premium branding solution. They feature a clear, raised dome that adds depth and durability, enhancing the visual appeal of logos, designs, or text. They are supplied in a 10" x 12.5" sheet format, not on a roll or individually cut.

      What materials are used for domed decals?

      The materials used for domed decals include a screen printed, die cut decal with a crystal clear polyurethane top coat. This polyurethane "dome" serves a dual purpose: it adds a 3-Dimensional look to the decal, enhancing the imprinting, and it provides additional protection. 

      The clear polyurethane coating not only contributes to the visual appeal of the domed decal but also acts as a durable shield, safeguarding the decal from scratches, UV exposure, and other environmental factors. Our Domed decals are supplied in a 10" x 12.5" sheet format, not on a roll or individually cut.

      What is the typical production time for domed decals?

      Our standard production time for domed decals is approximately four weeks. This duration allows us to maintain our high standards of quality and precision in crafting each decal. For urgent orders or specific timelines, please contact our customer support team for further assistance.

      Can I customize the shape and size of domed decals?

      Absolutely! We offer customization options to meet your specific needs. Whether you require a unique shape, size, or design, our team at Decals.com is here to collaborate with you and bring your vision to life.

      Can domed decals be used for outdoor applications?

      Yes, our domed decals are suitable for both indoor and outdoor use. The clear dome provides an extra layer of protection, making them resistant to scratches, UV exposure, and harsh weather conditions.

      What is the recommended care for dome decals?

      Domed decals are quite durable, but it's recommended to clean them gently with a mild detergent and avoid abrasive materials. This ensures the longevity of the decal's vibrant appearance.

      Will applying a domed decal harm vehicle paint?

      Dome decals, when properly applied, should not harm vehicle paint. They are designed to adhere securely to smooth surfaces without causing damage. However, it's crucial to follow proper application techniques and ensure that the vehicle's surface is clean and free of contaminants before applying the decal.

      What if I have specific design requirements or need assistance with artwork?

      Our design experts are here to help! Contact our team of professional graphic designers, and we can assist you with creating a design that perfectly suits your needs and complements your brand.

      How do you remove air bubbles from vinyl domed decals?

      If you experience air bubbles during installation of your vinyl domed decals, don’t sweat it, check out our simple video “How To Remove An Air Bubble From Under Your Sticker” for the step-by-step process.

      How do you remove air bubbles from custom vinyl domed decals?

      If you experience air bubbles during installation of your custom vinyl domed decals, don’t sweat it, check out our simple video “How To Remove An Air Bubble From Under Your Sticker” for the step-by-step process.

      Common Uses

      What are domed decals commonly used for?

      Domed decals, with their 3D effect and durable polyurethane coating, are widely used for product branding, automotive emblems, electronics, promotional items, industrial labeling, retail signage, and personalized merchandise. Their versatility combines visual appeal with durability across various applications.

      Order Custom Domed Decals

If you view a raster image at 200% or more you are able to see the individual pixels that make up the image. Raster images are dependent upon resolution so image enlargement is limited by the individual size at which the file was created. If a file is produced at a size that is larger than its resolution will allow, the quality will decrease. Printing a low resolution file will result in pixelation. Individual pixels are large enough to be easily discernable. Increasing the resolution will not solve this problem if there are not enough pixels to begin with. The program will add more pixels based upon the estimation of their location and will then assign their neighboring pixels's color value. This may cause an image to look muddy. If submitting these files, please follow the guidelines below: 100% scale (full size output) at 100 dpi 50% scale at 200 dpi or higher 25% scale at 300 dpi or higher 10% scale at 600-1200 dpi recommended Design Services If you are not able to provide us with a good quality image, we do have a vectorizing/recreating service available. Most logos or images can be recreated for as little as $15; however images with more detail are subject to quoting prior to vectorizing the image. Please contact a sales representative for more details. This service needs to be paid for in advance of us printing your order. We will keep your recreated vector artwork on file for you to use on all future orders. Releasing the recreated vector artwork to you for personal use can be done for an additional cost.
